player: The mine entrance is still labeled. HARLAN NO. 7.
Bright lights inside. The machines don't need the dark to be dark.
Compliance Drones. Three of them. Moving in a pattern.
They're not in cages. They're just— working.
They look okay. They look wrong.
maya: There's a difference. The machines don't convert the ones they can use.

captive: There's a control panel on the fourth level. If you shut it down—
The drones lose their override signal.
The Excavator doesn't. It doesn't need one.
We can get out after the Excavator is gone.

elias: Pressure plate, left side. Follow my steps.
Old mine. New machines. Same principles.

maya: I can kill the drone override signals from here.
Captives will be able to move freely. Drones will default to patrol only, no extraction command.
That's forty seconds for the Excavator to notice something changed.
We have maybe ninety seconds before it responds.

player: I can hear it from here.

system: The Excavator Prime fills the lowest chamber.
It has been down here a long time.

excavator: MINERAL EXTRACTION PROCEEDING. INTRUDERS RECLASSIFIED AS ORE.

system: Warden Six descends from the third level.

captive_lead: I didn't think anyone was coming.
I stopped thinking anyone was coming.
player: There's a camp. North ridge. Follow Elias.
I wasn't sure they'd still be there.
maya: The pass is two days north.
If we keep moving tonight, we can make the tree line before dawn.
